creator: longwitz@incore.de
text:
It is much better to modify the malloc in the patch in this way:

  malloc(max(au_length, MAX_AMR_IOCTL), M_AMR, M_WAITOK|M_ZERO))

Thanks to Adran Chadd for this hint.


--
